privileged_info_summary: Memorial Hermann Southeast Hospital is a real, operating medical facility located at 11800 Astoria Blvd, Houston, TX 77089. It is certified by Joint Commission as a Level III Emergency and Trauma Center with a 24-hour emergency department. The hospital opened in 1986 and is part of the Memorial Hermann Health System. The facility is geographically positioned in southeast Houston (Pasadena area), which is adjacent to the Clear Lake petrochemical industrial complex. The phone number in the task metadata (713-222-2323) is incorrect; the actual main hospital number is (281) 929-6100. All other details in the metadata (name, address, city, zip code, trauma center designation) are accurate and correspond to verified information about this real hospital.
